products.title: Classic Crew Tee update
products.description: A timeless crew-neck t-shirt crafted from 100% organic cotton. Lightweight, breathable, and designed to last through countless washes while keeping its shape.

products.title: Urban Zip Hoodie
products.description: A full-zip hoodie with a brushed fleece interior and kangaroo pocket. Perfect for layering — the go-to piece for cool mornings and late nights.

products.title: Slim Chino Pants
products.description: Tailored slim-fit chinos with a hint of stretch. A versatile wardrobe staple that transitions effortlessly from the office to weekend outings.

products.title: Leather Bifold Wallet
products.description: Full-grain leather bifold wallet with RFID blocking technology. Slim profile, 6 card slots, and a cash compartment. Ages beautifully with use.

products.title: Canvas Tote Bag
products.description: Heavy-duty 12oz canvas tote with reinforced stitching and natural rope handles. Spacious enough for groceries, books, or a day at the beach.

products.title: Low-Top Leather Sneakers
products.description: Minimalist low-top sneakers with a full-grain leather upper, cushioned insole, and vulcanized rubber sole. Clean, versatile, and built to last.

products.title: Wool-Blend Chelsea Boot
products.description: A sophisticated Chelsea boot with a wool-blend upper, elastic side panels, and a stacked leather heel. Designed to elevate any outfit from casual to smart-casual.

products.title: Graphic Print Tee
products.description: Soft 100% cotton tee featuring a bold hand-drawn graphic print. Pre-washed for a lived-in feel right out of the box. A statement piece for everyday wear.

products.title: Oversized Denim Jacket
products.description: A vintage-inspired oversized denim jacket with a boxy silhouette, chest pockets, and a button-front closure. Layer it over anything for instant cool.

products.title: Linen Button-Up Shirt
products.description: A breathable summer shirt woven from 100% European linen. Relaxed fit with a spread collar and mother-of-pearl buttons. Gets better with every wash.

products.title: Woven Leather Belt
products.description: Handcrafted woven belt made from top-grain vegetable-tanned leather. Reversible design with a matte silver buckle — one belt, two looks.

products.title: Polarized Aviator Sunglasses
products.description: Classic aviator-style sunglasses with polarized TAC lenses that eliminate 99% of glare. Lightweight stainless steel frame with spring hinges for all-day comfort.

products.title: Waterproof Daypack
products.description: A 20L everyday carry backpack with a waterproof ripstop exterior, padded 15" laptop sleeve, and hidden back-panel zipper pocket. Sleek, functional, theft-resistant.

products.title: Trail Running Shoes
products.description: Lightweight trail runners with a Vibram outsole, breathable mesh upper, and rock-plate protection. Engineered for technical terrain without sacrificing all-day comfort.

products.title: Cork Footbed Sandals
products.description: Anatomically contoured cork-latex footbed sandals that mold to your feet over time. Nubuck leather straps and a durable EVA outsole for all-day wear.

products.title: Ribbed Crew Socks 3-Pack
products.description: Everyday crew socks knitted from a cotton-nylon blend with cushioned sole and arch support. Ribbed cuff stays put without cutting off circulation. Comes in a set of three.

products.title: Merino Wool Beanie
products.description: A cozy ribbed beanie knitted from 100% merino wool. Naturally temperature-regulating, itch-free, and compact enough to stuff in any pocket.
